name: flagged
description: Agents disagree: security flags a fail while semantic passes — escalate on disagreement.

pr.title: Expose internal widget metrics endpoint
pr.author: rio
pr.description: Adds GET /internal/widget-metrics returning per-widget counters for the ops dashboard.

security-review.summary: The new metrics endpoint has no authorization check; any caller can read internal per-widget counters.

findings.title: Missing authorization on internal endpoint
findings.detail: GET /internal/widget-metrics is registered without an auth middleware, exposing internal counters to unauthenticated callers.

semantic-review.summary: The endpoint returns the per-widget counters described in the PR; intent is met.
semantic-review.intentSummary: Expose per-widget counters for the ops dashboard.
